# UpdateMediaAffinityIntentHandlingInvocationResponse

**Type**

The service’s response to a request to process an update media affinity intent.

## Declaration

```swift
* UpdateMediaAffinityIntentHandlingInvocationResponse
```

## Discussion

Allowed types: [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/UpdateMediaAffinityIntentHandlingResolveMediaItemsInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/UpdateMediaAffinityIntentHandlingResolveAffinityTypeInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/UpdateMediaAffinityIntentHandlingHandleInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/ProtocolExceptionInvocationResponse]

## Processing an Update Media Affinity Intent

- **UpdateMediaAffinityIntent**: An object that describes a user’s stated preference regarding media items.
- **UpdateMediaAffinityIntentHandlingInvocation**: A request to process an update media affinity intent.
